title: Agree with a source partly
subtitle: Accept one point and question another.
overview: Accept one point and question another.
Module: Source Reaction. B2 Bridge moves from strong B1 output into abstract thinking, source reaction, nuanced opinions, natural style, and longer spoken independence.

sections.title: B2 bridge focus
rows: Partial agreement is more useful than simply saying yes or no.
部分同意比简单说是或不是更有用。
B2 bridge frame: summarize the source, evaluate it, connect it to experience, and respond.
B2 Bridge 框架：总结来源、评价它、连接经验，并做出回应。
Partly agree with a short source.
I agree with the article that consistency matters, but I question the idea that every learner should use the same routine. People need routines that fit their energy, schedule, and goals.
我同意文章说持续性很重要，但我质疑每个学习者都应该使用同一种习惯的想法。人们需要符合自己精力、日程和目标的习惯。

items.en: Partial agreement is more useful than simply saying yes or no.
items.zh: 部分同意比简单说是或不是更有用。

items.en: B2 bridge frame: summarize the source, evaluate it, connect it to experience, and respond.
items.zh: B2 Bridge 框架：总结来源、评价它、连接经验，并做出回应。

items.en: I agree with the article that consistency matters, but I question the idea that every learner should use the same routine. People need routines that fit their energy, schedule, and goals.
items.zh: 我同意文章说持续性很重要，但我质疑每个学习者都应该使用同一种习惯的想法。人们需要符合自己精力、日程和目标的习惯。

items.en: I will not rush to sound advanced; I will make the idea clear first.
items.zh: 我不会急着显得高级；我会先把意思说清楚。

items.en: Then I will add nuance: a condition, a limit, a contrast, or a counterpoint.
items.zh: 然后我会加入细腻度：条件、限制、对比或反方观点。

items.en: If the sentence feels too heavy, I can paraphrase it in simpler spoken English.
items.zh: 如果句子感觉太沉重，我可以用更简单的口语英语改说。

items.en: A B2 answer should sound organized, flexible, and alive.
items.zh: B2 回答应该听起来有组织、灵活、有生命力。

items.en: I will record one answer and improve the structure, not only the grammar.
items.zh: 我会录一个回答，并改进结构，而不只是语法。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Partly agree with a short source.

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I agree with the article that consistency matters, but I question the idea that every learner should use the same routine. People need routines that fit their energy, schedule, and goals.
lines.zh: 我同意文章说持续性很重要，但我质疑每个学习者都应该使用同一种习惯的想法。人们需要符合自己精力、日程和目标的习惯。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add nuance or a limitation?
lines.zh: 你能加入细腻度或限制条件吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will add a condition, a contrast, or one fair counterpoint.
lines.zh: 可以。我会加入一个条件、一个对比或一个公平的反方观点。

items.en: Partly agree with a short source.
Answer once in four sentences, then expand it to six or seven sentences.
items.zh: 先用四句话回答一次，然后扩展到六七句话。

items.en: Add one phrase that shows nuance: generally, however, that said, or it depends.
items.zh: 加入一个显示细腻度的短语：generally、however、that said 或 it depends。

items.en: Record the answer and check whether the structure is easy to follow.
items.zh: 录下回答，并检查结构是否容易跟上。

items.en: Reuse the best sentence tomorrow in a new topic.
items.zh: 明天在一个新话题中再次使用最好的句子。
